info.title: ApiTwitter API
info.description: ApiTwitter REST API for Twitter/X: tweets, users, search, timelines, direct messages, lists, communities, and topics. Pay-per-use third-party Twitter API—documentation at https://docs.apitwitter.com

post.description:
Verify that the provided cookies are still valid and the session is active.

**Cost:** 5 credits

**Cost:** 16 credits
